commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=c9b531da8c1c118812d6e015e0af1a6144469781)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes waitForAgentJob to return a queued pending agent-run error snapshot when its outer timeout fires before the error grace timer, and adds a fake-timer regression test.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +34. Total +46 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: on current main, waitForAgentJob queues lifecycle errors in pendingAgentRunErrors, but the outer timeout still resolves null before the 15s grace timer records the snapshot. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs maintainer/author revision because the desired timeout response shape conflicts with the current pending-error grace semantics, proof is mock-only, and the branch is dirty against main.
